## Pull Request Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please check all boxes that apply:

- [ ] I have read the [AI Policy](https://github.com/theOehrly/Fast-F1/blob/main/docs/ai_policy.md)
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have added tests for new features
- [ ] I have updated documentation

## AI Disclosure

- [ ] No, this is completely human-written
- [ ] Yes, AI helped me (please explain below)
